holdings.infoBox: EQLT is an equity ETF with a total of 329 individual holdings. The top holdings are SK hynix stock at 6.23%, ASPEED Technology at 4.50%, Accton Technology at 4.37%, Infosys at 3.67%, and Lenovo Group at 3.56%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Emerging Markets Quality Factor ETF (EQLT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks an index of large- and mid-cap stocks from emerging markets selected for their high quality scores. The portfolio is market cap-weighted, with tilts based on the quality scores derived from fundamental factors. EQLT was launched on Sep 4, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI Emerging Markets Quality Factor Select Index
